ValidationRule.description: Applies to the "DX Software Services" Case record type
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ), OR(RecordType.Name = 'Dx Software Services', RecordTypeId = '0123A000001GjKo'), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed'), ISBLANK(DX_Functional_Area__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_007: When closing a Case, a value must be chosen for the Functional Area field.
